# DineKit community rules

DineKit's Discussions exist so restaurant owners and developers can ask questions, share setups, and vote on what gets built next. Keeping that useful takes a few rules.

## Do

- **Search before posting.** Duplicate ideas split the votes that decide the roadmap — upvote the existing post instead.
- **One idea per post** in Ideas, with the problem you're solving, not just the feature name.
- **Vote with the upvote button**, not with "+1" comments.
- Be specific: versions, steps, what you expected, what happened.
- Be patient and civil — most people here run busy hospitality businesses.

## Don't

- No harassment, personal attacks, or discrimination of any kind.
- No spam, advertising, affiliate links, or promotion of other products/services.
- **No private data** — never post passwords, Stripe keys (even test keys), license keys, customer names/emails/phone numbers, or booking data. Posts containing these will be deleted on sight for your own protection.
- No security vulnerability reports in public — see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md). Publicly posted vulnerabilities put every DineKit restaurant at risk and will be removed immediately.
- Don't bump threads or cross-post the same content into multiple categories.

## Moderation

Posts breaking these rules may be edited, locked, or deleted, and repeat offenders blocked, at the maintainers' discretion. Feature decisions ultimately rest with the Web Level Up team — votes are a strong signal, not a contract.

Questions about these rules: [weblevelup.co.uk/contact](https://weblevelup.co.uk/contact).
